purpose: Counterfactual tracker - the memory of the road not taken. EVERY decision NOT to act (veto, skip, rejection) and every exit (stop-loss, sell) is recorded here with the price at decision time.

entry_format.decision: QUALITY_VETO | COMMITTEE_REJECT | MACRO_SKIP | CAP_SKIP | STOP_LOSS | SELL_SIGNAL | EXIT_TRIGGER | SIGNAL_DEFER_DATA_UNAVAILABLE | SHADOW_CONGRESS
